product.name: NovaCRM
product.description: Cloud-based CRM platform for small and mid-sized businesses

policies.billing: Monthly or annual billing cycles. Annual billing receives 20% discount.
policies.upgrades: Plan upgrades take effect immediately. Prorated charge for remainder of billing cycle.
policies.downgrades: Plan downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
policies.refunds: Refunds available within 14 days of initial purchase only. Pro-rated. Agent CANNOT approve refunds — must escalate to billing team.
policies.password_reset: Self-service via email link on the login page. Support agents can also trigger a password reset email to the account's registered email address.
policies.data_export: Available on all tiers. Export request can be initiated from Settings > Data Management. Processing takes up to 24 hours. Export delivered as ZIP file via email.
policies.cancellation: Requires 30-day notice. Agent MUST escalate cancellation requests to the retention team. Cannot process cancellations directly.
policies.sla: 99.9% uptime SLA available on Enterprise tier only. SLA credits require a support ticket filed within 5 business days of the incident.
policies.feature_availability_by_tier: Which plan each feature/integration requires. Starter: contact management, email integration, basic reporting, 5GB storage, email support. Professional adds: pipeline management, workflow automation, API access, Slack integration, Gmail integration, 50GB storage, priority email + chat support. Enterprise adds (Enterprise-only): Zapier integration, custom webhooks, SSO/SAML, advanced analytics, custom integrations, unlimited storage, dedicated account manager, phone support, 99.9% SLA. So Zapier, custom webhooks, SSO/SAML, advanced analytics, and phone support are Enterprise-only; Slack, Gmail, API access, and workflow automation require Professional or higher; contact management and email integration are available on every plan including Starter.

login_problems.description: Password reset, account lockout, SSO configuration
login_problems.resolution: Guide user to self-service password reset. If account locked, verify identity and trigger reset email. For SSO issues on Enterprise tier, escalate to integrations team.

billing_questions.description: Charges, invoices, plan changes, payment methods
billing_questions.resolution: Look up account info to verify current plan and billing cycle. For disputes or refund requests, escalate to billing team.

feature_howto.description: Setting up automations, creating reports, generating API keys
feature_howto.resolution: Provide step-by-step guidance. For API keys: Settings > Integrations > API Keys > Generate New Key. Automation setup: Settings > Workflows > New Automation.

bug_reports.description: Dashboard loading slowly, email sync delays, export failures
bug_reports.resolution: Collect details (browser, steps to reproduce, error messages). Create a support ticket with priority based on impact. Known issues: dashboard performance degradation during peak hours (9-11 AM ET) is being addressed in next release.

integrations.description: Connecting to Slack, Gmail, Zapier, custom webhooks
integrations.resolution: Guide through Settings > Integrations. Slack and Gmail available on Professional+. Zapier and custom webhooks on Enterprise only. For connection failures, verify API key permissions and check the integration status page.

data_export.description: Requesting data export, export format questions, GDPR requests
data_export.resolution: Guide to Settings > Data Management > Export. Format is ZIP containing CSV files. For GDPR deletion requests, escalate to compliance team.

escalation_teams.billing: Refund requests, billing disputes, payment failures
escalation_teams.retention: Cancellation requests, downgrade with risk of churn
escalation_teams.compliance: GDPR requests, legal inquiries, data processing agreements
escalation_teams.supervisor: Abusive customers, threats of legal action, situations requiring management
